mapper.select: SELECT id, mask_rule_code, mask_rule_name, request_method, request_uri, mask_rule_regular, mask_json_path, enable_flag, mock_value, sort, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM mdm_mask_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND create_time <= #{timeTo} AND request_method = #{requestMethod} AND request_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestUri}, '%') AND mask_rule_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{maskRuleCode}, '%') AND mask_rule_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{maskRuleName}, '%') AND enable_flag = #{enableFlag} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT mask_rule_code, request_method, request_uri, mask_json_path, mask_rule_regular, mask_rule_script FROM mdm_mask_rule WHERE deleted = 0 AND enable_flag = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
